title: pleurospermum benthamii
intro: Pleurospermum benthamii, also known as Mountain Carrot, is a species of flowering plant in the carrot family, Apiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which can help to soothe and calm irritated skin and mucous membranes. The health benefits of Pleurospermum benthamii include its ability to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of the common cold. Pleurospermum benthamii can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, which can be used both topically and internally to harness its medicinal properties.
